zh.lifeSummary: Anna poland Polcka於1324年出生在波蘭馬左維次吉華利札瓦。她於1337年9月6日與Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1363年2月16日在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉沃格福斯吉沃格奧福享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Anna poland Polcka于1324年出生在波兰馬左維次吉華利札瓦。她于1337年9月6日与Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1363年2月16日在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉沃格福斯吉沃格奧福享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Polcka
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Czech, Slovak, and Polish: from Polka (Slovak Poľka), an ethnic name denoting a woman from Poland (compare Polak ).
Polish: from a pet form of the female personal name Apolonia.

Polish (Połka): from a pet form of a personal name, such as Świętopołk and Przedpołk, based on Old Slavic plъkъ ‘crowd, army’. The surname is used almost exclusively in central part of Greater Poland Voivodeship.

variants.name: Polcyn
meanings: Polish: habitational name from Połczyn (Germanized as Polzin, now called Połczyn-Zdrój) in West Pomeranian Voivodeship, named with the personal name Połka (see Polka ).

variants.name: Polczynski
meanings: Polish: habitational name for someone from Połczyno or Półczno in Pomeranian Voivodeship or Połczyn-Zdrój in West Pomeranian Voivodeship, probably named with the personal name Połk, Połka (see Polka ).

variants.name: Polak
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Miroslaw, Zbigniew, Boguslawa, Dorota, Jacek, Andrzej, Bogdan, Eugeniusz, Grzegorz, Irena, Jerzy, Jozef.

Polish and Jewish (Ashkenazic); Czech, Slovak, and Hungarian (Polák, Slovak also Poľák): ethnic name for someone from Poland (Polish Polak, Slovak archaic and Czech Polák). In the case of the Ashkenazic name, the reference is to a Jew from Poland. This surname is also found in Germany, where it is also of Sorbian origin (see 3 below), and in the Netherlands. Compare Poliak , Poljak , and Polyak .

Slovenian and Croatian: topographic name for someone who lived in open country, derived from polje ‘field’, or a habitational name for someone from any of numerous places called Polje, named with this word. It may also be e.g. an occupational name for a field guard (see Poljak ).

en.lifeSummary: Anna poland Polcka was born in 1324, in Warsaw, Masovia, Poland. She married Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau on 6 September 1337. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 16 February 1363, in Głogów, Głogów, Lower Silesia, Poland, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Anna poland Polcka est née en 1324, à Warszawa, mazowieckie, Pologne. Elle a épousé Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau le 6 septembre 1337. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 février 1363, à Głogów, głogowski, dolnośląskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Anna poland Polcka wurde 1324 in Warschau, Masowien, Polen geboren. Sie hat am 6. September 1337 Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. Februar 1363 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Głogów, głogowski, Niederschlesien, Polen.

it.lifeSummary: Anna poland Polcka è nata il nel 1324 nel Warszawa, mazowieckie, Polonia. Lei sposato Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau il 6 settembre 1337. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 febbraio 1363, nel Głogów, głogowski, dolnośląskie, Polonia, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna poland Polckaは1324年にポーランドマゾウィエクイワーッザワで生まれた。1337年9月6日にHerzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogauと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1363年2月16日にポーランドドルノsルaスキグlオゴウスキグlオグoウで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna poland Polcka(은)는 1324년 폴란드 마즈위키 워스자와에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1337년 9월 6일 Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 2월 16일 폴란드 도노sa스키 그l고우스키 그l그ow에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau em 6 de setembro de 1337. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Anna poland Polcka родилась в 1324 г. в местности Варшава, мазоуиекки, Польша. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Herzog Heinrich Zelazny von Schlesien ,Herzog von Schlesien-Sagan und Schlesien-Glogau 6 сентября 1337 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 16 февраля 1363 г. в местности гlогoв, гlогоуски, долноsлaски, Польша в возрасте 39 лет.
